bead.title: Stage 1.11: update external docs (website, personas, resources)
bead.description: Update docs/helix-adjacent files referencing the frontend stack: website/content/docs/server/_index.md, library/personas/architect-systems.md, any docs/resources/*.md that reference the stack. Swap to SvelteKit+GraphQL+Houdini+Bun. See docs/plan-svelte-migration.md Stage 1 bead #11.
bead.acceptance: (1) website/content/docs/server/_index.md has zero React references. (2) library/personas/architect-systems.md architectural context section names SvelteKit+GraphQL. (3) All files compile/render (no broken markdown).
